seo.title: Web Design for Local Businesses | Langston Woods
seo.description: Professional websites for local service businesses: landscapers, cleaners, contractors, and more. Get more customers with a site built for results.
seo.author: Langston Woods

hero.eyebrow: Web Design for Local Service Businesses
hero.desc: I build clean, professional websites for local service businesses: landscapers, cleaners, contractors, pressure washers, auto detailers, pet groomers, and more. You focus on the work. I'll handle everything online.

services.label: Who it's for
services.sub: If you run a local service business, I offer custom web design no matter the industry. Here are a few examples, but the list doesn't stop here.

cards.title: Landscapers & Lawn Care
cards.desc: Show off your work, post seasonal packages, and make it effortless for homeowners to request a quote.

cards.title: Cleaning Services
cards.desc: Build trust with a polished presence that makes booking a recurring clean feel simple and reliable.

cards.title: Contractors & Handymen
cards.desc: Highlight past projects and trade skills and give clients one clear way to reach you.

cards.title: Pressure Washing
cards.desc: Before-and-after galleries that do the selling for you, paired with a fast contact form.

cards.title: Pet Grooming & Dog Walking
cards.desc: Approachable sites with easy scheduling and service menus that pet owners love.

cards.title: Auto Detailing
cards.desc: Showcase your packages and pull in new customers actively searching for detailers nearby.

services.footerLinkText: Reach out anyway. If you have a business, I can build your site.

problem.label: The problem
problem.intro: Your work speaks for itself, but if customers can't find you, or land on a site that breaks on their phone, they're going straight to your competitor.

items.d: Over a third of local service businesses have zero web presence, invisible to anyone searching Google.
A site that looks old, loads slow, or breaks on mobile sends customers running before they even read a word.

items.t: No clear way to contact you
items.d: If a potential client has to hunt for your phone number, they won't bother. You lose the job.
Without photos, reviews, or a professional look, new customers have no reason to choose you over the next result.

solution.label: What I build
solution.intro: I handle everything: design, development, and launch. You stay focused on your business while I build the digital storefront that brings new customers to your door.

items.d: Every site loads instantly and looks sharp on any device, especially the phones your customers are using.
Clean, modern designs that make your business look established and credible from the first second.
Click-to-call, contact forms, and Google Maps integration. All the friction removed for your customers.
Basic on-page SEO built in from day one so local customers searching for your services can actually find you.

cards.label: Simple
cards.name: Simple Website
cards.note: Perfect for personal pages & simple needs

cards.label: Standard
cards.name: Business Website
cards.note: Everything you need to get online

cards.label: Optional Add-on
cards.name: Monthly Care Plan
cards.note: I keep your site running & up to date

steps.d: A free, no-pressure call to understand your business, your customers, and exactly what you're looking for.
I create a custom mockup tailored to your brand: layout, colors, copy, and structure. You review and give feedback.
I code and test the full site. No tech speak, just clear updates at every stage.
Two dedicated rounds of revisions based on your feedback. You review, I refine until it feels exactly right.
Your site goes live on your domain. I walk you through the basics and you start getting found.

cta.label: Ready to grow
cta.sub: A professional website is the single best investment you can make for your local business. Let's start with a free conversation.

contact.label: Let's talk
contact.sub: Free 20-minute call, no pressure, no sales pitch.
